name: Sopa Mexicana De Flor De Calabaza (Pumpkin Flower Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 Jalapeno pepper or 1 Poblano pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
Wash and prepare the pumpkin flowers by cutting them in half and removing the stamen.
1. In a large pan, melt 1/2 cup of butter and add the maize grains. Cook until slightly browned.
2. Add the zucchini and pumpkin flowers to the pan, stirring occasionally until the vegetables start to release their juices.
3. Stir in the epazote and salt. Reduce heat and let simmer for a few minutes.
4. In another saucepan, melt the remaining 1/2 cup of butter. Add the chopped onion (and pureed tomato if using) and cook until translucent.
5. Stir in the red tomato puree, salt, and pepper to taste. If using chicken flavor cubes, add them now.
6. Gently stir in the diced jalapeno or poblano peppers (peel poblanos before adding).
7. Slowly add 3 cups of water, stirring occasionally until vegetables are soft.
8. Just before serving, gently fold in the fresh cream. The soup should not boil.
Note: Recipe from Miguel Angel Castillo.
